scripts.dev:db: docker compose -p xiyiyun up -d mysql redis
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose -p xiyiyun up -d mysql redis backend
scripts.build:backend: docker compose -p xiyiyun run --rm backend mvn -q -DskipTests package
scripts.test:backend: docker compose -p xiyiyun run --rm backend mvn -q test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/h5 run build && npm --workspace apps/web run build && npm --workspace apps/admin run build
scripts.check: npm run schema:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test:backend && npm run smoke
